source_artifacts.name: VBB Berlin S-Bahn quality tool
source_artifacts.role: primary evidence layer for 2019 onward monthly KPI values
source_artifacts.access_method: TYPO3 filter form plus embedded chart and table attributes

source_artifacts.name: VBB quality archive
source_artifacts.role: older backfill or sensitivity source only; not merged into this dataset
source_artifacts.access_method: PDF and ZIP links on the VBB quality archive page

metric_definitions.punctuality_p3: Share of arrivals no more than 3:59 minutes late.
metric_definitions.punctuality_p0: Share of arrivals no more than 0:59 minutes late.
metric_definitions.reliability_zg: Delivered train-km divided by scheduled train-km on the day-current timetable.
metric_definitions.overall_ranking: VBB line comparison score combining punctuality and reliability.

notes: Month option 13, Gesamtjahr, is intentionally skipped to keep this file monthly.
Future or unavailable months represented by '-' in the VBB chart data are omitted.
Network punctuality_p3 and reliability_zg are the headline primary evidence series.
Line values are drilldown evidence and should not replace the network headline series.
